query:
SELECT 
  s.id, s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, s.monthlyCost, s.costSource,
  s.billingItemId,
  bi.description AS bi_desc, bi.lineAmount AS bi_amount, bi.quantity AS bi_qty, bi.unitAmount AS bi_unit
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.id = s.billingItemId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%ASG Hail%' LIMIT 1)
  AND s.planName LIKE '%UCXcel Webex Basic%'
ORDER BY s.id;
